description: Check whether a production or external-state action has the evidence needed to proceed.
body: Use before executing or recommending deploys, migrations, deletes, secret rotations, traffic shifts, production config writes, or external service mutations. Do not use to perform the mutation itself. Actions: list the intended action, target environment, reversibility, user-visible impact, approval evidence, backup or rollback evidence, and monitoring guardrails; return proceed only when explicit approval and environment proof are present. Validation signals include ticket, runbook, dry-run output, backup confirmation, canary guardrail, and incident commander approval. Risk boundary: missing approval yields needs_human or blocked, not automatic failure and not silent execution.
